purpose: Primary-source baseline candidates for AURA publication validation. This is source/protocol provenance only, not completed metric evidence.

3dgs.notes: Official authors implementation for 3D Gaussian Splatting for Real-Time Radiance Field Rendering.

2dgs.notes: Official implementation for 2D Gaussian Splatting for Geometrically Accurate Radiance Fields.

nerf.notes: Nerfstudio provides train/eval workflows for NeRF-family baselines such as nerfacto/mipnerf.

ray_traced_gs.notes: Official implementations of 3DGRT and 3DGUT for ray-traced and hybrid Gaussian rendering.

nerf_benchmark_framework.notes: Framework for evaluating and comparing existing NeRF methods; candidate harness if it supports the selected scene/data format.

nextSteps: choose scenes and resolution shared with AURA local benchmark splits
run or import each baseline's renders on the same held-out views
rerun aura publication-validation-report and require the external_method_baselines gate to pass
